_comment: Working example: a homelab k3s cluster running ~16 user namespaces with a custom prefix (`the-*`), source manifests split between a per-workload repo and a legacy bundle directory. Adjust the include patterns, paths, and critical-PVC list to match your own cluster.
cluster_context: Single-node k3s on ARM Grace+Blackwell. Network: Tailscale (mgmt plane) + Traefik (data plane) + Authelia 2FA. Secrets: SealedSecrets controller in kube-system; etcd AES-CBC encryption. Storage: local-path provisioner, no CSI. Backups: host-level CronJob system writing to Cloudflare R2.

critical_workloads._comment: PVCs of stateful services whose loss would be catastrophic. Missing backup of these = -25 to Operational Resilience.
